Sandbox_TrueSmoking_OverrideSmokeLength_: Forces every cigarette, cigar, pipe, etc. to use the value below
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_SmokeLength_tooltip:
Base length of all smokables when Override is enabled or item has no custom length
Higher = lasts longer
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_SmokingSpeed_tooltip:
Global burn speed for ALL smokables
25 = lasts forever · 100 = balanced · 200 = burns very fast
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_PuffStrength_tooltip:
How strong each puff feels (nicotine hit + stress/boredom relief)
50 = weak puffs · 100 = normal · 200 = very strong
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_MovementBurn_tooltip:
How much faster the smoke burns when walking, running or sprinting
25 = barely burns while moving · 100 = normal · 200 = burns fast when active
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_IdleBurnOut_tooltip:
How quickly the cigarette goes out when standing still
0 = never goes out (always stays lit)
100 = goes out normally (needs relighting)
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_EffectMultiplier_too:
Multiplies all effects from smoking (nicotine, stress relief, boredom relief, etc.)
50 = half effects · 100 = normal · 200 = double effects
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_HungerReduction_tool:
How much smoking reduces hunger
0 = no hunger reduction · 0.25 = subtle (default) · 1.0 = vanilla strength · 2.0 = double
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_FatigueReduction_too:
How much smoking reduces fatigue
0 = no fatigue reduction · 0.25 = subtle (default) · 1.0 = vanilla strength · 2.0 = double
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_ManageHeadGear_toolt: Automatically lowers shemaghs, gas masks, etc. when smoking and re-equips them after
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_SmokeRelighting_tool: If the ember gets too weak, you can relight it instead of it dying completely
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_Coughing_tooltip: Enable chance to cough when taking a puff
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_CoughingChanceSmoker: Chance (%) to cough per puff if player has the Smoker trait
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_CoughingChanceNonSmo: Chance (%) to cough per puff if player does NOT have the Smoker trait
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_Dropping_tooltip: Chance to drop your lit cigarette when falling, climbing, or hit by zombies
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DropChanceSmoker_too: Drop chance (%) if player has the Smoker trait
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DropChanceNonSmoker_: Drop chance (%) if player does NOT have the Smoker trait (much clumsier!)
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_UseNewMoodle_tooltip: Enables the new smoking moodle which better reflects nicotine levels and withdrawal
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_UseNicotineSystem_to: Turns on nicotine tracking, withdrawal effects, and dynamic addiction
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DaysToAddiction_tool: How many in-game days of heavy smoking until player gains the Smoker trait
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DaysToDetox_tooltip: How many in-game days without smoking until player loses the Smoker trait
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DynamicSmokerTrait_t: Players can gain or lose the Smoker trait based on smoking habits
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_SmokerTraitDecayMult:
How quickly addiction and withdrawal decrease when player has the Smoker trait
Higher = faster decay
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DaysToPeakWithdrawal: How many in-game days it takes to reach peak withdrawal symptoms after quitting
Sandbox_TrueSmoking_DebugMode_tooltip: Enable debug logging and debug UI panel (for mod developers and troubleshooting)
